title: PV Sindhu's Early Steps to Stardom in Macau
indian_angle: This article highlights the formative years of Indian badminton star PV Sindhu's career.
summary: This article explores PV Sindhu's initial journey and development in badminton, tracing her early steps towards becoming a star in Macau.

title: Thomas Cup Squad Reunites for Asian Games; Treesa-Gayatri Back
indian_angle: The Indian badminton squad is reassembling for the Asian Games, including the return of key Indian doubles pair Treesa Jolly and Gayatri Gopichand.
summary: The Indian badminton squad from the Thomas Cup is reassembling for the Asian Games, with Treesa Jolly and Gayatri Gopichand making their return to the team.

title: Tanvi Sharma's Game Compared to Saina Nehwal and PV Sindhu

summary: An analysis of young Indian shuttler Tanvi Sharma's playing style, drawing comparisons to the legendary Saina Nehwal and PV Sindhu.

title: PV Sindhu Needs More Self-Belief to Overcome An Se-young

summary: An analysis of PV Sindhu's mental game and the self-belief required for her to consistently defeat top opponent An Se-young.

title: Ayush Shetty Dominates Chinese World No 15 Weng Hong Yang
